summary: Testing authentication race condition fix and role-based UI. All 5 tests PASSED! The auth race condition fix in _layout.tsx with splash screen is working correctly. isCustomer and isAdmin states now propagate correctly to components.

issues: Download button/icon could be more prominent - currently just shows filename with small icon

critical_code_review_comments: Auth race condition fix is working - _layout.tsx shows splash screen until loading=false
AuthContext loadUser() properly sets loading=false after checking token/user data
isCustomer and isAdmin correctly evaluate based on user.role after login
Components re-render properly when user state changes
Tab visibility (href: isAdmin ? '/admin' : null) works correctly to hide tabs from customers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth race condition fix is verified working. All role-based UI elements render correctly. Tests confirmed: Customer sees 'Generate RFQ' button, Admin sees 'Calculate Price' button. Admin sees 6 tabs (includes Admin, Customers), Customer sees 4 tabs (no Admin, no Customers). Admin sees filter tabs (All, Pending RFQ, Approved) on Quotes page with prices visible. Customer sees 'My RFQs' without filter tabs and without prices. Attachment section and download icons visible in quote detail modal for admin.

test_1_customer_generate_rfq_button.details: Customer login successful, 'Generate RFQ' button visible, 'Calculate Price' NOT visible
test_1_customer_generate_rfq_button.console_logs: CalculatorScreen render - user: {...} role: customer isCustomer: true

test_2_admin_calculate_price_button.details: Admin login successful, 'Calculate Price' button visible, 'Generate RFQ' NOT visible
test_2_admin_calculate_price_button.console_logs: CalculatorScreen render - user: {...} role: admin isCustomer: false

test_3_admin_tab_visibility.details: Admin sees 6 tabs: Calculator, Search, Quotes, Customers, Admin, Profile. Customer sees 4 tabs: Calculator, Search, Quotes, Profile (Admin/Customers hidden)

test_4_quotes_filter_tabs.details: Admin sees filter tabs: All, Pending RFQ (20), Approved. Customer does NOT see filter tabs - just sees 'My RFQs' header without filters
test_4_quotes_filter_tabs.console_logs: QuotesScreen - user: {...} isCustomer: false isAdmin: true

test_5_attachment_download_buttons.details: Attachments section visible in quote detail modal with filename (image001-18.png), Export PDF button visible, Edit Quote button visible

rca_of_previous_issue: Previous issue: Components rendered with null user and isCustomer=false before auth resolved. Root cause was auth loading race condition. Fix applied: Added loading state check in _layout.tsx that shows splash screen until auth loading completes. This ensures components only render after user state is fully resolved from AsyncStorage.
